subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-03-30 in Stuttgart
subcodes.first_line: I wished to come without apprising anyone. I love the Baha'is of Stuttgart very much.
subcodes.first_line_orig: من خواستم بیخبر بیایم احبای استتکارت را خیلی دوست دارم همه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @growth of the Cause, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
